Name: FExternalToolDefinition
Description: Structure for defining an external tool

Variables.Name: ToolName
Variables.Description: The name of the tool  test.

Variables.Name: ExecutablePath
Variables.Description:
The executable to run. 
	UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category=ExternalTools, meta=(FilePathFilter = ""))

Variables.Name: CommandLineOptions
Variables.Description: The command line options to pass to the executable.

Variables.Name: WorkingDirectory
Variables.Description: The working directory for the new process.

Variables.Name: ScriptExtension
Variables.Description: If set, look for scripts with this extension.

Variables.Name: ScriptDirectory
Variables.Description: If the ScriptExtension is set, look here for the script files.
